Collection: fraud_alerts
Document Structure:
{
  "_id": "ObjectId",        // Auto-generated unique ID
  "type": "String",         // e.g., "TRANSFER", "CASH_OUT"
  "amount": "Double",       // Transaction value
  "oldbalanceOrg": "Double",
  "isFraud": "Int32",       // 1 for Fraud, 0 for Legitimate
  "flagged_by": "ML_Model_V1" // Custom metadata allowed in NoSQL
}
